title: Forge Project Config
description: Per-repository .forge/config.yaml. The engine-vs-project seam: every pipeline phase and the runner read this at runtime. Project-agnostic.

base_branch.description: Default branch PRs target and feature branches are cut from.

protected_branches.description: Single source of truth for the git guardrail's protected list. The hook reads this (relative to cwd) before falling back to FORGE_PROTECTED_BRANCHES or its built-in default.

vcs.description: Version control host and CLI used for PRs/MRs.

cli.description: CLI used by the integrate phase. Default derived from host (github->gh, gitlab->glab).

pr_target.description: Base/target branch for PRs (GitHub) or MRs (GitLab).

commands.description: How forge builds and checks THIS repo. Phases shell these out. Empty string means the phase skips that step.

test.description: Test command. Verify shells this. Required key; must be non-empty when code-changing task types are enabled.

overrides.description: Optional project specialization. Phases fall back to the generic engine behavior when these dirs are absent.

autonomy.description: How much the runner may do without a human.

default_tier.description: 0 read-only | 1 branch+PR | 2 gated (plan approval). Applied when a task spec does not set its own autonomy_tier.

allow_unattended.description: Task types the runner may process unattended (overnight).

require_gate.description: Task types forced to tier-2 plan approval regardless of their own tier.

notifications.description: Optional outbound notifications from the unattended runner.

discord_webhook.description: Discord webhook URL the runner posts its end-of-run summary to. May also be set via FORGE_DISCORD_WEBHOOK.

budget.description: Cost and concurrency controls the runner honors.

nightly_usd.description: Runner stops launching NEW tasks once cumulative night spend reaches this.

monthly_usd.description: Soft monthly cap. Set BELOW your account credit ceiling so forge throttles itself rather than getting cut off mid-build.

max_attempts.description: Attempts per task across the combined verify->build and review->build recovery loops; once exhausted the task parks blocked.

concurrency.description: Max parallel headless sessions. Git-touching work is ALWAYS serialized regardless of this value.

models.description: Phase -> model. Passed as --model to `claude -p` for that phase.

modelRef.description: A Claude Code model alias or a pinned full model name. Aliases verified from official docs: default, best, opus, sonnet, haiku, opusplan, opus[1m], sonnet[1m]. Full strings like claude-opus-4-8, claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 (optional [1m] suffix on opus/sonnet).
